testcase.name: test_restricted_product_hidden_from_blocked_customer
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter91_visibility_email_fixes.py:95: in test_product_restricted assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create restricted product: {resp.status_code} {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create restricted product: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","restricted_to",0],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":null}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter91_visibility_email_fixes.py:95: in test_product_restricted assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create restricted product: {resp.status_code} {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create restricted product: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","restricted_to",0],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":null}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_whitelist_product_visible_to_whitelisted_customer
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter91_visibility_email_fixes.py:116: in test_product_whitelist assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create whitelist product: {resp.status_code} {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create whitelist product: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","visible_to_customers",0],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":null}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_whitelist_product_hidden_from_anonymous
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter91_visibility_email_fixes.py:116: in test_product_whitelist assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create whitelist product: {resp.status_code} {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create whitelist product: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","visible_to_customers",0],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":null}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_product_with_restricted_to
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter91_visibility_email_fixes.py:221: in test_create_product_with_restricted_to assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Create failed: {resp.status_code} {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","restricted_to",0],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":null}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_product_restricted_to
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter91_visibility_email_fixes.py:253: in test_update_product_restricted_to assert update_resp.status_code == 200, f"Update failed: {update_resp.status_code} {update_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Update failed: 500 {"detail":"An internal error occurred. Please try again later."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
